tasks.title: Implement src/utils/git.ts
tasks.description: MODIFY: Update `detectDefaultBranch` to support overrides; Replace slow `gitLineCount` loop with a single `git rev-list --objects --all` or `git ls-tree` based approach for better performance; Implement `gitDraftLineCount` correctly.

tasks.title: Implement src/engine/pulse.ts
tasks.description: MODIFY: Update `scanRepository` and `bucketByWeek` signatures to accept `branch` override; Implement `totalDrafts` calculation in `bucketByWeek`.

tasks.description: MODIFY: Ensure Zod schemas align with DM-001/DM-002; remove hardcoded stubs.
